pi_items.source: Confirmed in task.json description, setup_task.sh line 19, export_result.sh line 12, and verifier.py line 28. Consistent across all task files.

Task description states 'Do not allow concurrent builds'. Setup creates job with concurrentBuild=true (bad state). Verifier.py lines 52-54 checks concurrent_val == 'false'. XML element <concurrentBuild> is standard Jenkins Freestyle job configuration verified via Jenkins documentation.

Task description states 'Set a quiet period of 45 seconds'. Setup creates job with no quietPeriod element (empty state). Verifier.py lines 60-62 checks quiet_val == '45'. XML element <quietPeriod> is standard Jenkins configuration (integer representing seconds) verified via Jenkins documentation and Job Builder reference documentation.

Task description states 'Restrict where this project can be run to the label expression build-server-v2'. Setup creates job with canRoam=true and no assignedNode (no restriction). Verifier.py lines 68-77 checks node_val == 'build-server-v2'. XML element <assignedNode> is standard Jenkins configuration verified via Jenkins API documentation and Jenkins core model documentation.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Jenkins Freestyle job named 'Legacy-Monolith-Build' with three resource constraints: disabling concurrent builds (concurrentBuild=false), setting a quiet period of 45 seconds, and restricting execution to nodes labeled 'build-server-v2'. The job is initially created with concurrent builds enabled, no quiet period, and no node restriction. All metadata values correctly specify the target configuration state required by the task. The XML configuration elements (concurrentBuild, quietPeriod, assignedNode) are standard Jenkins Freestyle job configuration parameters.
